controls.tryIt: Try it -- the tour continues once you do
controls.skippedBody: Some steps were skipped because their screen or control wasn't available. You can retake the tour anytime from Settings.

offer.heading: Take a quick tour
offer.subheading: Short walkthroughs of what's new in this release.
offer.introTitle: New here? Take the introduction tour
offer.introSubtitle: A quick walkthrough of the basics.

settings.title: Guided tours
settings.description: Walk through the app's features step by step.
settings.resetError: Couldn't reset tour progress. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Monize
welcome.body: This quick tour shows you around the core of the app. You can leave anytime by pressing Escape or End tour.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.body: This is your dashboard. Use the Customize button in the top-right to rearrange or hide widgets so the summaries you care about sit right at the top.

tools.title: The Tools menu
tools.body: The Tools menu is where you manage the building blocks of your finances -- payees, categories, currencies, tags and more.

accounts.title: Your accounts
accounts.body: Add your bank, credit card, loan, and investment accounts here with Add Account. Every balance and transaction belongs to an account.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.body: This is your transaction register -- every payment and deposit for your accounts lives here, ready to search and filter.

createTransaction.title: Record a transaction
createTransaction.body: Add income or spending with New Transaction. Go ahead and open the form.

fields.title: Payee, category and amount
fields.body: For each transaction you pick a payee, assign a category, and enter the amount. Categories are what power your budgets and reports.

splits.title: Split a transaction
splits.body: One purchase covering several categories? Use Split to divide a single transaction across categories -- groceries and household from one shop, say.

currencyField.title: Foreign currencies
currencyField.body: Bought something abroad? Set the currency here and enter the amount as charged -- Monize converts it to the account currency for you.

closeForm.title: Close the form to continue
closeForm.body: Close the transaction form (Cancel or the X) and the tour will move on.

bills.title: Bills & Deposits
bills.body: Schedule recurring bills and deposits so upcoming payments are forecast and nothing slips through the cracks.

investments.title: Investments
investments.body: Track your holdings, prices, and returns across your investment accounts.

budgets.title: Plan with budgets
budgets.body: Budgets let you set monthly targets per category and track how you're doing against them.

reports.title: Understand your money
reports.body: Reports turn your transactions into charts -- spending by category, net worth over time, and more.

finish.title: You're all set
finish.body: That's the tour. You can retake it anytime from the Guided tours section in Settings.

welcome.title: Track spending in other currencies
welcome.body: Bought something abroad? This tour sets up a card's foreign-transaction fee, records a purchase in the currency you were charged, and shows where those costs turn up. Leave anytime with Escape or End tour.

openAccountEdit.title: Start on the card
openAccountEdit.body: Foreign-transaction fees belong to the account. Pick a credit card you use abroad and choose Edit from its row actions -- or long-press the row on mobile -- to open its settings.

fxFeePercent.title: Set the conversion fee
fxFeePercent.body: Enter your card's foreign-transaction fee here as a percentage -- 2.5, say. Monize folds it into the converted amount of every foreign purchase, so the fee is captured for you.

closeAccountForm.title: Save and close
closeAccountForm.body: Save the account (or close the form) to carry on.

newTransaction.title: Record a foreign purchase
newTransaction.body: Now log a purchase you made on that card in another currency. Open New Transaction and pick that card as the account.

entryCurrency.title: Choose the currency you paid in
entryCurrency.body: This button sets the currency the amount was charged in. Type the total exactly as it appears on your statement and Monize converts it, showing the rate you can edit to match your bank. Only your own currency in the list? Choose 'Add currency...' at the bottom to add one.

closeTransactionForm.title: Close the form
closeTransactionForm.body: Save or close the transaction form and the tour continues.

openAccountDetail.title: Back to the card
openAccountDetail.body: Open that card's Details page -- choose Details from its row actions -- to see how the foreign activity is summarized.

fxSection.title: Your foreign-currency section
fxSection.body: Accounts with foreign activity gain this section: the fees paid per currency, a chart over time, and the matching transactions, exportable to CSV and PNG. It appears once the account has a foreign purchase.

report.title: The Foreign-Currency Fees report
report.body: This report gathers foreign purchases across all your accounts and currencies in one place, so you can see what those "no foreign fee" cards really cost. Open it anytime from Reports.

finish.title: That's foreign currency in Monize
finish.body: Set a fee once, enter purchases as charged, and the fees track themselves. You can retake this tour anytime from the Guided tours section in Settings.

whatsNewToggle.title: Release highlights
whatsNewToggle.body: This toggle controls whether the What's New summary pops up automatically after an update.

appVersion.title: Reread the notes
appVersion.body: Click the version label at the bottom of Settings anytime to reopen the release notes.

done.title: That's it
done.body: You can revisit these highlights whenever you like from here in Settings.
